label: namecode - KEOGRAM.SKY | 92.251
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by Keogram: The Sky in 2025. What if you could see the entire sky -- all at once -- for an entire year? That, very nearly, is what is pictured here.  Every 15 seconds during 2025, an all-sky camera took an image of the sky over Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
